name: Astrolabe of the Falling Stars
description:
This astrolabe is fashioned of magically attuned platinum plates and rings and is inset with carefully measured ruby gems. The astrolabe's back is engraved with helpful charts, a calendar, and a maker's mark. An astrolabe of falling stars can be used as a . In addition, it can produce the following magical effect.

Activate 2 (Interact)

Frequency once per day

Effect With a flick of your finger, you set the astrolabe's rule spinning, causing the inset rubies to become a blur. Choose a point within 100 feet. The astrolabe of falling stars calls down a brief rain of meteorites in a centered on that point, dealing ,1d8[fire]|options:area-damage]{1d8 bludgeoning and 1d8 fire damage} to creatures in the area ().
